parameters.text: =📊 Weekly Competitor Price Report ⚠️ {{ $json.count }} price discrepancies detected this week. Top flag: {{ $json.flags[0]?.product }} — competitor {{ $json.flags[0]?.competitorPrice?.toLocaleString() }} vs ours {{ $json.flags[0]?.ourPrice?.toLocaleString() }} LKR ({{ $json.flags[0]?.diffPct }}%) 🔗 Review at Admin → Pricing

meta.description: Scrapes competitor product pages weekly via Browserless (free tier), compares prices against TechMo's dynamic pricing, and alerts the manager via email + Telegram if discrepancies exceed 10%.
